_README: Curated starter content for the Our Story Firestore database. Collections map to docId -> document. Upload with: node scripts/seed-firestore.mjs. Edit any of this freely before uploading; you can also delete/replace it inside the app afterwards. Authored Phathu <-> Ayanda; dates anchored to friendshipStart 2024-02-01 and relationshipStart 2026-05-08 (Mbombela, Mpumalanga).

seed-letter-01.title: The first thing I'll tell our kids
seed-letter-01.body: One day when our kids ask how we started, I'm telling them the truth: I was terrified. I had a whole speech ready and forgot every word the second you looked at me. You make me brave and nervous at the same time, Ayanda, and I would choose that feeling every single day.

seed-letter-02.title: Thank you for the ordinary days
seed-letter-02.body: Everyone talks about the big moments. My favourite part of loving you is the boring stuff: you telling me what you ate, us arguing about whose playlist we use, you falling asleep on a call. Thank you for making ordinary days feel like somewhere I actually want to live.

seed-letter-03.title: To the one who built me a world
seed-letter-03.body: Phathu, you literally built me an entire app just to remind me I'm loved. Who does that? You do. I don't always have the words the way you do, but hear me on this one: I see you. All of you. And I'm not going anywhere.

seed-letter-04.title: A house in Mbombela
seed-letter-04.body: I keep picturing it. A small place not far from home, music a little too loud, your shoes by the door where I always trip on them. We'll figure out the money and the timing and all of it. I just already know the address has you in it.

seed-letter-05.title: Read this on a hard day
seed-letter-05.body: You are not behind. You are not too much, and you are not too quiet. God didn't make a mistake when He made you, and He didn't make one when He put you in my life either. Breathe. Whatever it is, we take it together. I've got you.

seed-letter-06.title: No reason, just you
seed-letter-06.body: No occasion. I just woke up grateful that it's you. That's the whole letter.

seed-dream-01.title: Ask you properly
seed-dream-01.note: Not a hint, not a maybe. A real question, on one knee, with people crying in the background. And yes, I already asked your sister for your ring size. Act surprised.

seed-dream-02.title: Cape Town, just us
seed-dream-02.note: Table Mountain, an ocean too cold to actually swim in, and way too many photos. One tank of petrol and no plan.

seed-dream-03.title: A kitchen big enough to dance in
seed-dream-03.note: Neither of us can cook. I don't care. I want a kitchen we can dance in while the food quietly burns.

seed-dream-04.title: Graduate side by side
seed-dream-04.note: Both of us, caps in the air, our families fighting over who gets the better photo. We finish what we started.

seed-dream-05.title: Sunday service, then breakfast
seed-dream-05.note: Church in the morning, then that breakfast place, then doing absolutely nothing for the rest of the day. My perfect Sunday.

seed-dream-06.title: Sunrise from God's Window
seed-dream-06.note: Wake up before the sun, drive up, and watch the whole lowveld light up from God's Window. Cold hands, one blanket, zero complaints.

seed-mem-01.title: Where it all began
seed-mem-01.description: We started as friends back in February 2024. I had no idea yet that the girl I kept finding excuses to talk to was going to become my whole heart.

seed-mem-02.title: The call that went till 3am
seed-mem-02.description: First time we talked until the sun nearly came up. I was wrecked the next day and didn't care even a little.

seed-mem-03.title: The day we made it official
seed-mem-03.description: 8 May 2026. The day you said yes to being mine. Best yes I have ever heard in my life. Everything in this app counts from this day forward.

seed-mem-04.title: The chair incident
seed-mem-04.description: You were trying so hard to be smooth and the chair just... left. I have never laughed that hard. I'm still not over it.

seed-mem-05.title: Praying together for the first time
seed-mem-05.description: The first time we prayed together, it stopped feeling like just us. It felt like us and God in the same room. I want a whole lifetime of that.

seed-mem-06.title: The day Our Story went live
seed-mem-06.description: I finally finished building this and put real love inside it. Hi from the day it all became real, Ayanda. Keep scrolling — there's so much more in here for you.

seed-msg-01.text: Welcome to Our Story, my love. 💗 I built this so you'd always have somewhere to feel how loved you are.

seed-msg-02.text: Everything in here is real — the letters, the dreams, all of it. Open them whenever you miss me.

seed-msg-03.text: Happy forever, Ayanda. 8 May 2026 was the best yes I ever heard. 🤍
